run_summary.summary: Three deals with activity today. Aqara Cameras is ready to invoice — the reel went live Apr 16 and the brand confirmed it. SOJOS Vision updated their contract per Kenny's revision request, so the updated version needs a review. New inbound: Goldfish Swim School reached out via the Creator Opportunity platform with a paid family/parenting campaign — they want a decision in the next 3-5 days.

suggestions.message: The Aqara reel is live — time to send that invoice! 💸
Ruby updated the SOJOS contract per Kenny's revision request on the draft due date language — worth reviewing today or tomorrow.
Paid family/parenting campaign from a national swim school franchise — aligns well with Liz's content. Tight 3-5 day decision window, so needs a look today.

deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Reel confirmed live — https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXDLWFnjWeI/?igsh=dDM2cGl6dTE3cjB5 — brand (via socialmediacollabs.com) asked if it went live, Liz confirmed and shared link
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Reel confirmed posted — moved to Delivered. Send invoice now.

deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Ruby (marketing202@sojosvision.com) updated contract per Kenny's revision request — language around draft due date relative to product receipt was clarified. Review updated version.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Ruby updated SOJOS contract per Kenny's revision request on draft due date language — waiting on our review.

deals.next_action: Decide whether to submit interest via Creator Opportunity platform
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Inbound paid campaign via creatoropportunity.com — 'Let's Talk Parenting, Safety & Swim'. Deliverables: 1 IG Post/Reel OR TikTok OR YouTube + 1-year content licensing. Rate TBD — submit interest via platform form to propose own terms. Reviewing options in next 3-5 days. Note: bulk platform outreach, not direct personal contact.
